abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.ff17e67a59539df4]{Face Desolation} while your epic background vow is unfulfilled, it is not yet your time. Instead of rolling, you may take an automatic strong hit. If you do, this asset counts as an impact (and you no longer have this protection) until you next @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.0d7f13818c1c19ed]{Reach a Milestone} on the background vow.
When you on @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0d7f13818c1c19ed]{Reach a Milestone} your background vow, take +2 momentum or +1 spirit.

When you fill a box on your background vow progress track, mark 2 ticks on your quests legacy track. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow}, your fate is at hand. Envision your final sacrifice and reroll any dice..
